name: Incognito
official_rules_text: A unit with the Incognito keyword cannot be attacked by enemy units that are not within 1 of it, cannot Contest Objectives, and cannot provide Backup. If a unit with the Incognito keyword ever makes an attack or defends against an attack, it loses the Incognito keyword for the remainder of the game. Additionally, at the beginning of a unit with the Incognito keyword’s Activation, it may choose to lose the Incognito keyword for the remainder of the game.
